title: Crystals Unscaved
description: A Mod that adds some ores to the game.
body:
DESCRIPTION - 

Crystals Unscaved is a mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge and Fabric that is currently in its beginning stage. It introduces new ores to the game, which is said to have originated from some otherworldly place, and is considered a divine gift from the gods.

CURSEFORGE VERSION: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crystals-unscaved

ORES INCLUDED IN THE MOD:

Luminescent Crystal Ore 
- Found only in Deepslate, this ore is rarer and stronger than Netherite.

Blooddripped Ore 
- Found only in Deepslate and often confused with Redstone, this ore is rarer and stronger than Luminescent Crystals, killing anything in one hit.





no that is not an emerald axe in the thumbnail
